validation_cycles.overview: The Planning Hub dispatches the Plan Validator (sdlc-plan-validator) after each phase. The validator checks traceability, consistency, completeness, and conflict detection. Validation is a blocking gate — the hub does not proceed until validation passes.

checks.check: PRD passes all 8 internal validation dimensions at "high"
PRD has all 14 sections with substantive content
User stories in section 7 are grouped by feature area

validation.gate: ALL checks must pass before dispatching Phase 2 agents.

validation.trigger: Architecture and Security agents both complete

checks.check: Architecture covers all PRD components and capabilities
Security covers all PRD security/privacy NFRs
Architecture and Security are consistent (no conflicts in auth, encryption, network)
Technology stack decisions are consistent across both documents

validation.gate: No CRITICAL findings before dispatching Phase 3 agents.

validation.trigger: All Phase 3 agents complete (HLD, API, Data, DevOps, Design)

checks.check: API Design matches architecture integration points
Data Architecture supports all HLD data entities
DevOps supports architecture and security requirements
Design mockups cover PRD user-facing flows
Cross-domain consistency (technology stack, data models, auth, terminology)

validation.gate: No CRITICAL findings before dispatching Phase 4 agents.

validation.trigger: User story verification and Testing Strategy agent complete

checks.check: All PRD requirements trace through HLD to user stories
All user stories have testable acceptance criteria
Testing strategy covers all acceptance criteria
Full-chain traceability: PRD → Architecture → HLD → Stories → Tests
Cross-domain requirements (security, devops, data) reflected in stories

validation.gate: No CRITICAL findings before handoff to coordinator.

validation_failure_handling.step: If validator returns FAIL with CRITICAL findings, do NOT proceed to next phase.
Identify which agents produced the conflicting artifacts.
Re-dispatch the minimum set of agents needed to resolve the conflicts.
Include the validator's specific findings in the re-dispatch message.
If validation fails 3 times on the same finding, escalate to the user for a decision.
